checked_sources: OpenStax Elementary Algebra 2e Ch 7.1-7.4 reference listed in course JSON
Khan Academy Factoring Polynomials practice and video references listed in course JSON
findings: Module title, order, objectives, and assignment all align with the published Algebra I course JSON for Module 13 (Factoring Polynomials).
No AP, College Board, Common App, CEEB, accreditation, NCAA, or college-admissions claims appear in the lesson narration, slides, or metadata.

No sourced or generated bitmap images are used; the GCF decomposition, trinomial pair-search table, sign-rules card, difference-of-squares rule cards, perfect-square-trinomial example, and the sum-of-squares trap columns are all drawn deterministically in build_slides.py.
No URLs are read aloud in the narration; resources are referenced by name (OpenStax, Khan Academy).
Title and description guidance remains conservative and GIIS-owned; foundation-only framing matches the playbook.

Resource set in source_packet.json (Khan Academy factoring practice, OpenStax Elementary Algebra 2e Ch 7, Khan Academy factoring trinomials video) is free/usable and matches the course JSON references.
